hero.title: Building the boundaries of imagination with technology
hero.description: ESAP is a creative technology studio exploring the future of human-AI coexistence through interactive storytelling and immersive worldbuilding.

storytelling.title: Interactive Storytelling
storytelling.description: Branching narratives and immersive reading experiences telling stories of androids and humans coexisting. Every choice shapes the story.

worldbuilding.title: Worldbuilding
worldbuilding.description: A complete sci-fi universe with character archives, technical documentation, organizational structures, and timelines. A living, ever-growing fictional universe.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: All code is open source on GitHub, creative content shared under CC-BY 4.0. We believe in the power of open collaboration.

philosophy.quote: We're not just writing stories. We're building a world.
philosophy.description: Every character has an independent personality and growth arc. Every technical detail is rigorously designed. This isn't one person's creation — it's a future built by a community.
